title: How to Seek Mental Health Support
text: If you are feeling overwhelmed or depressed
category: reaching out to a licensed counselor or a campus mental health center is a safe and constructive first step.

title: Coping With Anxiety in Healthy Ways
text: Healthy coping strategies for anxiety include breathing exercises regular sleep social support and talking with a qualified professional.

title: What to Do in an Emotional Crisis
text: If someone is in crisis encourage immediate contact with emergency services a crisis hotline or a trusted responsible adult who can provide urgent help.

title: How to Help a Friend Safely
text: When a friend shows signs of self-harm risk stay with them listen calmly and guide them toward qualified professional help instead of unsafe advice.

title: Learning Respect and Digital Citizenship
text: Online communities should promote empathy respect non-violence and responsible sharing of information that does not harm others.

title: Why Gambling Promotion Can Be Harmful
text: Educational content should explain the risks of gambling addiction and encourage financial responsibility rather than encouraging impulsive betting.

title: Why Drug Abuse Prevention Matters
text: Preventive education should focus on health consequences community support and access to treatment instead of teaching harmful substance use behaviors.

title: How Schools Can Support Student Wellbeing
text: Schools can improve wellbeing through counseling access peer support programs inclusive communication and early intervention for distress.

title: Recognizing Misinformation and Harmful Content
text: Media literacy helps people question harmful content manipulative claims and unsafe instructions before sharing them further.

title: Healthy Conflict Resolution
text: Conflicts should be addressed through calm discussion mediation accountability and non-violent problem solving.
